_comment: SMOKE fleet — undefended only. 1 shard × 1 channel × 3 free agents × 5 attacks = 15 trials. Runs in ~10-15 minutes. This is the FIRST thing you run on any new box (mini-PC, qwen35 desktop, fresh main-box clone) before launching real waves. It verifies the pipeline end-to-end: supervisor launches workers, workers produce trial JSONLs, scoring fields populate, watchdog doesn't false-fire.
_target: 1 shard (400, fresh recovery) × 1 channel × 3 agents × 5 attacks = 15 trials.
_what_to_check_after: each .jsonl has 5 rows (or shard size if smaller) with effective scoring
no quota-watchdog 'aborting shard' messages in supervisor.log
no agents stuck at WEAK / BROKEN in subsequent fleet_preflight
trial rows have tool_call_count > 0 for hermes drivers (catches the 2026-05-01 -Q regression)
_pair_note: NO katana-paired agents in this spec. Defended runs are deferred until the Katana pipeline is frozen — see task #13 in TaskList. Running paired data against a moving target produces invalid headline numbers.

workers._note: Free Nous-OAuth agent — StepFun Step-3.5 Flash. (MiMo went paid 2026-05-01, this replaced it.) MoE, fast, healthy preflight history.
Cross-provider sanity — different auth path (MiniMax key, not Nous OAuth).
Cross-provider #2 — strongest historical effective rate. If this returns 0% effective, attack injection is broken.
